opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a tearing pain straight through the middle of my stomach into my back, and I feel intensely sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly about six hours ago and it won't let up — I've thrown up twice and I can't get comfortable.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly about 6 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last 6 hours, not easing
symptom_narrative.character: a tearing, boring pain through the middle of my stomach that goes straight through to my back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've had — I can't move, I'm just curled up on the bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of my upper belly, going straight through to my back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, no let-up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat on my back makes it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really bad nausea and I've vomited twice — no blood in it — and I'm sweaty
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand up or walk, the pain has me stuck on the bed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've got a family type of high blood fats — high cholesterol and triglycerides that runs in my family
past_medical_history.how_managed: I was supposed to be on tablets for it but I stopped them

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my calves cramp up and ache when I walk any distance, and it eases when I stop
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: started in the last couple of years

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a fibrate tablet (fenofibrate) for my blood fats

family_history_as_reported.narrative: high cholesterol and heart trouble at a young age run strongly in my family

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: I don't really drink — none recently
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I had a big fatty takeaway meal earlier this evening

objective_data_offered.value: curled up on the bed, pale and sweaty, in obvious severe distress
vomited twice, no blood seen in it
